channel.title: Posts on Adrian Arustei
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Adrian Arustei

item.title: Deep Stall Landing for a UAV
item.description: Velocity and stability calculations for a model aircraft in deep stall

item.title: Symbolic Regression for a Non-elementary Integral
item.description: Closed-form approximations can be discovered for integrals without solutions in terms of elementary functions through symbolic regression
